results.title: Aromatic Broth Of Asparagus With Caviar
results.creditsText: Foodista.com – The Cooking Encyclopedia Everyone Can Edit
results.summary: Aromatic Broth Of Asparagus With Caviar might be just the hor d'oeuvre you are searching for. One portion of this dish contains approximately 7g of protein, 4g of fat, and a total of 225 calories. This gluten free, primal, and pescatarian recipe serves 14 and costs $3.23 per serving. If you have parsley, heavy cream, chicken stock, and a few other ingredients on hand, you can make it. It is brought to you by Foodista. 1 person has tried and liked this recipe. From preparation to the plate, this recipe takes around 45 minutes. With a spoonacular score of 39%, this dish is rather bad. If you like this recipe, you might also like recipes such as Aromatic Vietnamese beef broth, Aromatic Vietnamese beef broth, and Kale and asparagus Asian broth with spelt.
